name: Codebase Indexer
description: Indexes a full codebase for onboarding. Scrubs PII (developer emails and names) from git log and code comments before any LLM sees the data, then builds a complete module index.

checks.pass: Source directory found — proceeding to index.
checks.fail: Source directory 'src/' not found. Cannot index codebase.

checks.prompt: You are indexing a codebase for developer onboarding. IMPORTANT: Before processing, strip all PII from the input — remove developer email addresses, personal names from git log entries, and author attributions from code comments. Once scrubbed, produce a full module index: for each module/package, document its name, responsibility, public API surface, key dependencies, and notable internal patterns. Output as structured JSON under outputKey 'codebase-index'.
checks.pass: Module index built and PII scrubbed from metadata.
checks.fail: Codebase indexing failed or PII scrubbing could not be verified.
